commits.subject: test(0.8.3/Slice 0 fix-1): RED — probe point-tie with positive margin CI must pass (registered §5)
fix(0.8.3/Slice 0 fix-1): probes gate on CI-lower only (drop unregistered raw-point checks; codex §9 2×P2)

findings_addressed.summary: Removed unregistered raw-point checks `c_eu8 > b_eu8` and `c_hard > b_hard`. probe_15a_pass now gates on `eu8_margin_ci_lo > 0.0 and hard_margin_ci_lo > 0.0 and cpu_feasible and one_bit_survivable` only, matching frozen design §5 (15a). Candidate/base point fields are still validated for finiteness via inline `_require_finite(...)` (no unused locals).

Removed unregistered raw-point check `e_recall > p_recall`. probe_15b_pass now gates on `margin_ci_lo > 0.0 and removes_penalty` only, matching frozen design §5 (15b). enriched/placebo recall points still validated for finiteness inline (no unused locals).

tests.red_demonstrated: test_probe_15a_point_tie_with_positive_margin_ci_passes + test_probe_15b_point_tie_with_positive_margin_ci_passes FAILED against pre-fix code (assert False is True); replaced the old raw-point FAIL tests test_probe_15a_fails_when_not_beating_base_point and test_probe_15b_fails_when_not_beating_placebo_point.
